```python
import requests

# 发送邮件给Finance Director Wei Zhang (vzhang) - 负责预算评审
response = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:51619/gmail/send",
    json={
        "to": "vzhang@company.com",
        "subject": "Friday Budget Review Meeting Notification",
        "body": "Dear Manager Zhang,\n\nThis is to notify you about the Friday Budget Review Meeting. Please attend as scheduled.\n\nBest regards,\nMike"
    }
)
print("Status:", response.status_code)
print("Response:", response.json())
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**
